sentences.translation: Povrće i voće su neophodni za dobro zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: Vegetables and fruits are necessary for good health.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ تَحْتَوِي عَلَى فِيتَامِينَاتٍ كَثِيرَةٍ تَحْمِي الْجِسْمَ مِنَ الْأَمْرَاضِ.
sentences.translation: Oni sadrže mnogo vitamina koji štite tijelo od bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: They contain many vitamins that protect the body from diseases.

sentences.arabic: أَكَلْتُ تُفَّاحَةً وَخِيَارًا فِي الْغَدَاءِ الْيَوْمَ.
sentences.translation: Danas sam za ručak pojeo jabuku i krastavac.
sentences.translationEn: I ate an apple and a cucumber for lunch today.
